authors: Kapural L, Yu C, Doust MW, Gliner BE, Vallejo R, Sitzman BT, Amirdelfan K, Morgan DM, Yearwood TL, Bundschu R, Yang T, Benyamin R, Burgher AH
title: Comparison of 10-kHz High-Frequency and Traditional Low-Frequency Spinal Cord Stimulation for Chronic Back and Leg Pain
study_question: Does HF10 therapy outperform traditional low-frequency SCS for chronic back and leg pain long term?
population_assessed: Adults with chronic intractable back and leg pain at 11 US pain centers
outcome_measures: Back pain responders, leg pain responders, VAS back pain, VAS leg pain, ODI
inclusion_criteria: Chronic trunk/limb pain, refractory 3 months, back and leg VAS at least 5, ODI 41-80
answer_to_study_question: HF10 therapy provided superior durable back and leg pain relief versus traditional SCS through 24 months
